nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: North Moluccan pitta
nodes.summary: The North Moluccan pitta (Erythropitta rufiventris) is a species of the pitta. It was considered a subspecies of the red-bellied pitta. It is endemic to Indonesia where it occurs on the northern Moluccas. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
nodes.shortSummary: The North Moluccan pitta (Erythropitta rufiventris) is a species of the pitta. It was considered a subspecies of the red-bellied pitta.

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏

nodes.name: Erythropitta
nodes.summary: Erythropitta（Erythropitta）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如呂宋八色鶇、红胸八色鸫、苏拉八色鸫等13种鸟类。
